name: com.brassworks.sidecar.room-setpiece-kit04
description: Unity-only sidecar package for room-scale steampunk setpieces: boiler chambers, pressure vault alcoves, catwalk balconies, regulator machinery, ceiling pipe galleries, service stairs, furnace control walls, brass thresholds, warning gauge walls, and clutter clusters.

samples.description: Sidecar preview notes and Unity menu commands for generated proof renders.
